name: WW-Hearty Lentil Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 packets instant beef broth and seasoning mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine lentils and water. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat, cover the pan, and let simmer until lentils are tender, about 20 minutes.
3. Add remaining ingredients to lentils and stir to combine. Cover and cook over low heat until potatoes are tender, 20 to 30 minutes.
4. Remove bay leaf before serving.
Each serving provides:
2 protein exchanges
1 bread exchange
1 1/2 vegetable exchanges
Nutritional Information per Serving:
10 calories (optional exchange)
258 calories
15 g protein
1 g fat
50 g carbohydrate
819 mg sodium
0 mg cholesterol
